title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 30 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 30 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 30 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, an increase only 0.98% throughout the day; the main contract closed 669.5. thequotation in the morning was increased by 5 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
